diagrams.title: Simple Neural Network Architecture
diagrams.description: A feedforward neural network with input layer, two hidden layers, and output layer showing connections between neurons
diagrams.purpose: Understanding basic network structure and data flow

diagrams.title: Backpropagation Process
diagrams.description: Flow diagram showing forward pass (data input to output) and backward pass (error gradient from output to input)
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how networks learn from errors

diagrams.title: Overfitting vs Underfitting
diagrams.description: Three curves showing training and validation loss: underfitting (both high), optimal (both low and close), overfitting (training low, validation high)
